# Frontend shared utility verification (2026-03-10 10:30Z)

_**User**_

Verify that ALL frontend shared utility files and their consumers are correctly wired up in `d:\web development\test\src\`:

1. Read `src/utils/api.js` - should export `apiFetch`, `apiJson`, `apiPost`, `apiGet`, `API_BASE`
2. Read `src/utils/format.js` - should export `formatDuration`, `formatDurationShort`, `formatNumber`, `formatPercent`, `formatAht`
3. Read `src/utils/csv.js` - should export `downloadCsv`
4. Read `src/utils/roles.js` - should export `ROLES`, `ROLE_IDS`, `normalizeRole`, `getRoleRedirectPath`

Then verify consumers actually import from shared utils (NOT using local duplicates):
5. Read `src/context/AuthContext.jsx` - should import `normalizeRole` from `../utils/roles.js` and `apiFetch` from `../utils/api.js`. Should NOT have local `ROLE_IDS`, `normalizeRole`, `API_BASE`, or `apiFetch` definitions.
6. Read `src/components/ProtectedRoute.jsx` - should import from `../utils/roles.js`. Should NOT have local `ROLE_IDS` or `normalizeRole`.
7. Read `src/pages/Login.jsx` - should have dev hints wrapped in `import.meta.env.DEV` conditional, and error div should have `role="alert"` and `aria-live="polite"`.
8. Read `src/pages/Reports.jsx` (first 60 lines) - should import from `../utils/api.js`. Should NOT have local `const API = ...` definition. Should use Layout component.

Return a detailed table: File | Expected Change | Actual Status | Issues
